name: Grandma Murphy's Irish Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, sugar, raisins, and caraway seeds.
2. Add the buttermilk and egg to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
3. Grease a cast iron frying pan with cooking oil or butter.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
5. Place the pan in a preheated oven set to 350 degrees Fahrenheit (175 degrees Celsius).
6. Bake for one hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean and golden brown.
7. Turn off the oven and let the bread cool in the pan for at least 30 minutes before slicing and serving.
